title: orchis mascula subsp. olbiensis
intro: Orchis mascula subsp. olbiensis is a subspecies of the early purple orchid, a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is traditionally valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Orchis mascula subsp. olbiensis include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and processing the roots, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
